# Shivam Thakur — Full Stack Developer

> Shivam Thakur is a full-stack developer who designs and builds fast, scalable web
> applications end to end with React, Next.js and Node.js. This site is his portfolio:
> case studies of shipped products, the services he offers, and practical articles on
> modern web development. The whole site is static HTML with clean, extensionless URLs.

## About

- Name: Shivam Thakur
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Core stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, WhatsApp Cloud API, WebSockets
- Focus: full-stack web apps, SaaS products, API and backend development, frontend engineering, web performance and SEO
- Availability: open to freelance and contract work
- Contact: shivam.it1311@gmail.com
- Homepage: https://shivamthakur.me/

## Case Studies

- [Case Studies overview](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies): index of selected projects with problem, solution and results.
- [mydigisence](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies/mydigisence): a SaaS platform for digital presence and a services marketplace — website, listings and bookings in one place. Built with Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL and MongoDB. Live at https://mydigisence.com
- [Prodigichat](https://shivamthakur.me/case-studies/prodigichat): a SaaS WhatsApp marketing and automation tool — broadcast campaigns, chatbot flows and a shared team inbox on the WhatsApp Cloud API. Built with React, Node.js, Redis and WebSockets. Live at https://prodigichat.com

## Services

- [Services overview](https://shivamthakur.me/services): full list of what Shivam offers.
- [Web Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/web-development): full-stack web apps built end to end with React, Next.js and Node.js.
- [Web Design](https://shivamthakur.me/services/web-design): modern, responsive UI/UX and design systems.
- [API & Backend Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/api-backend-development): REST and GraphQL APIs, auth, data modelling, scalable Node.js architecture.
- [Frontend Development](https://shivamthakur.me/services/frontend-development): pixel-accurate, accessible, high-performance React interfaces.
- [Performance & SEO](https://shivamthakur.me/services/performance-seo): Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, structured data, and AEO/GEO signals.

## Blog

- [Blog overview](https://shivamthakur.me/blog): articles on full-stack development.
- [REST vs GraphQL: Choosing the Right API Style](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/building-rest-vs-graphql): trade-offs in over-fetching, caching, versioning and team fit.
- [Deploying a Full-Stack App on Vercel: The Complete Guide](https://shivamthakur.me/blog/deploying-fullstack-on-vercel): builds and preview deployments, environment variables, serverless functions, database connection pooling, caching, cron jobs and cost control.
